raw.official description: Bonespur hits mark targets with spikes. Quick Melee and Violent Leap's slash detonate them for 30 explosive damage.
raw.ability details:
* A spike is created when the target has been hit by 14 pellets from Bonespur.
* Multiple enemies can be marked at the same time, however each enemy can only have one mark at a time.

raw.official description: Violent Leap’s Slash deals 50% more damage to enemies above 250 health.
raw.ability details:

* HP threshold is of the target's current total hit points. Heroes exactly at 250 HP do not take bonus damage.
* The hit marker gains a slight yellow hue and plays a higher pitch sound when the bonus damage triggers.

raw.ability details: * Cooldown begins immediately upon use. * Enemy collision is disabled during leap * During leap, Hazard can slash by pressing the ability button again or Quick Melee. * There is a brief period after hitting ground where the slash can still be activated. * Being stunned or slept temporarily prevents the reactivation, but does not fully interrupt the ability. * Slashing gives Hazard a slight boost. * Hazard can use primary fire and all his other abilities while leaping. ** Activating ''Could not find 'Downpour' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'' or starting to wall climb will interrupt the leap and prevent the slash followup, but firing or using other abilities do not. * Leap trajectory and distance can be adjusted with view angle and directional keys.

abilities.name: Jagged Wall

raw.official description: Launch a spiked wall that damages and knocks back nearby enemies.
raw.ability details: * Cooldown begins as soon as it's fired. * The projectile will transform into a wall upon impacting the ground, ceiling, wall or a surface of another terrain-like object. ** The projectile doesn't collide with enemy [[heroes]]. ** Projectile can be blocked by [[barriers]] while in flight, but contact with the deployed wall cannot. ** Projectile can be destroyed by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]] while in flight, but contact with the deployed wall cannot be blocked. ** If the object the wall is attached to is destroyed, Jagged Wall will be destroyed as well. ** The deployed wall can be manually destroyed by pressing the ability button again. * Enemies that touch the wall take damage and are [[knocked back]]. Whenever an enemy is hit by the wall, there is a 1.75 second delay before they can be hit by it again. * Deployed Jagged Wall is a terrain-like [[object]]; it has collision and blocks line of sight. ** On ground and ceiling surfaces, the wall will be oriented longer side facing the player. When deployed on wall surfaces, the top side will be facing away from the wall and the shorter side will be facing up as the new top surface. ** The wall has a walkable top surface regardless of the orientation it was deployed in. * Hazard can use Vault on the wall, and touch a friendly wall without taking damage. * Wall cannot be damaged or destroyed by [[File:Ability Sombra EMP.png|sub|link=Sombra#EMP|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#EMP|EMP]]. * Wall can be lifted by [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]] if attached to it. * Unlike most other objects, Jagged Wall does not get crushed by [[File:Tree_of_Life_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|Tree of Life]]. The tree can be deployed on top of Jagged Wall or next to it but not in the same space. * Jagged Wall may prevent pillars from [[File:Ability-mei3.png|sub|link=Mei#Ice Wall|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Ice Wall|Ice Wall]] from rising if the latter is attempted to be deployed in the same space.

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Scale short walls and grab ledges.
raw.ability details:
* Wall Climb ends when the player stops holding the button, the wall ends or the duration is up. It cannot then be used again until the player has landed on a walkable surface.
** Violent Leap resets wall climb.
* Hazard will grab and mantle ledges over 0.4 seconds if the input is held while facing a ledge of a walkable surface.
** This does not count as starting Wall Climb, and can be done even if Wall Climb was already used.
* Can reach up to 5.7 meters from ground (6.5m with jump) due to momentum being kept.
* The obstacle must be at least 1.25 meters tall to trigger Vault.
* Hazard destroys fences and other breakables when climbing near them.

abilities.name: Spike Guard

raw.official description: Protect yourself from frontal damage. Firing homing spikes at nearby enemies and regenerating ammo.
raw.fire rate: 6 shots/s
raw.ability details: * Damage per second: 70 * Resource meter recharges over 4.29 seconds. * Has a 0.75 second regen delay. * Can fire up to 18 shots per target over the full duration. * Spike Guard is a [[channeled]] ability; Hazard cannot use other abilities or fire while it is active and it is interrupted if he is stunned, knocked down or hacked. ** The impact damage from the instance that applied an effect that interrupted Spike Guard will still be blocked. ** Activating any other ability deactivates Spike Guard. If secondary fire is held, Spike Guard starts again when the previous ability finishes. * While active, periodically fires 1 missile at each enemy within the area, dealing damage to first enemy in their way. ** Targets heroes and all [[objects]], excluding [[barriers]]. ** Enemies can be targeted through barriers, but barriers still will block projectiles trying to pass through them. ** Ammo only regenerates while dealing damage to an enemy, including objects. ** Piercing and Area of Effect keywords are misleading. Only the targeting has an "area of effect", and the produced projectiles do not pierce heroes, but can be blocked by other heroes on their way to the intended target. * Regenerates 1 ammo every 0.44 seconds, as long as you deal continuous damage to the target(s) for the 0.44s. * Damage is blocked if the horizontal angle between the direction Hazard is facing and the direction from the impact location to its source is less than 90 degrees. ** Hazard's vertical view angle does not affect blocking or targeting. ** Effectiveness extends to area abilities and splash damage from projectiles. Damage is generally blocked when facing the center of the AoE. *** Damage from [[File:Ability-hanzo4.png|sub|link=Hanzo#Dragonstrike|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Hanzo#Dragonstrike|Dragonstrike]] and [[File:Ability-torbjorn5.png|sub|link=Torbjörn#Molten Core|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Torbjörn#Molten Core|Molten Core]] is blocked regardless of facing direction. *** Does not reduce damage from [[Sombra]]'s [[File:Ability Sombra EMP.png|sub|link=Sombra#EMP|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#EMP|EMP]] or Sigma's [[File:Abilities-sigma5.png|sub|link=Sigma#Gravitic Flux|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Gravitic Flux|Gravitic Flux]] (incl. both lift and slam). ** Spike Guard mitigates delayed or triggered detonation damage from sticky projectiles and debuffs, regardless of the direction Hazard is facing. *** Following abilities are affected: [[File:A-36_Icon.png|sub|link=Bastion#A-36 Tactical Grenade|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Bastion#A-36 Tactical Grenade|A-36 Tactical Grenade]], [[File:STICKY BOMBS.png|sub|link=Echo#Sticky Bombs|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Echo#Sticky Bombs|Sticky Bombs]], [[File:Ability-tracer4.png|sub|link=Tracer#Pulse Bomb|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Tracer#Pulse Bomb|Pulse Bomb]] and [[File:Captive_sun_icon.png|sub|link=Illari#Captive Sun|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Illari#Captive Sun|Captive Sun]]. ** Does not affect [[damage over time]] effects from abilities.

abilities.name: Downpour
shot_type: [[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type:
[[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Rain down a torrent of spikes, Immobilizing enemies.
raw.ability details: * Downpour's cast can be interrupted from being hit by [[crowd control]] during its startup. * Hazard loses 50% of his aerial momentum while casting Downpour. * A hitscan attack is fired from above each enemy in the area at an angle of 70°. ** Targets can be hit by shots aimed at targets under them, causing them to block it and take the damage instead. ** The area and spikes are not blocked by terrain. ** The spikes can be blocked by [[barrier]]s, destroyed by D.Va's [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], Orisa's [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], Sigma's [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], Doomfist's [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]], and Mizuki's [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by Genji's [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]] on the way down. ** The initial animation, where Hazard fires the shots upwards, is only a visual effect and does not produce projectiles that can be interacted with in any way. ** Also targets [[objects]], excluding [[barriers]]. * Spikes start falling in front of Hazard 0.9 seconds after the startup finishes. The rain then extends away from Hazard, reaching the maximum range over 0.7 seconds. * Enemies hit by Downpour take damage and are [[rooted]] for 2.8 seconds.
